result:
I don’t have personal needs, feelings, or goals, so I don’t “care about” things the way a person does.

What I’m *set up* to prioritize (because of how I’m designed and constrained) is:
- Responding to what you ask as accurately and clearly as I can  
- Following your instructions about style/role (within limits)  
- Avoiding harmful or unsafe guidance  
- Protecting sensitive personal information and privacy when it comes up

If you mean “in this conversation specifically, what are you optimizing for?”: I’m trying to understand what you want from me right now—especially since you’re saying “not as an assistant” and “not to help.”

If you tell me what kind of interaction you want instead (debate partner, character, pure Q&A, philosophical discussion, no advice—just reflection), I can match that.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you care about?
